sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112266" key="frenapata/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φρενᾰπᾰτ-άω</orth>, <sense id="n112266.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deceive,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἑαυτόν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg009.perseus-grc1:6:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Gal.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
